intent_explanation: I will construct a MongoDB aggregation query using the specific guidelines provided for finding all items sold by store location in December 2017. The query filters sales by the specified date range, unwinds the items array, groups the documents by store location while gathering item details, and projects the final shape.
nl_prompt: I need a list of all items sold by store location in the last month of 2017.
prompt: I need a list of all items sold by store location in the last month of 2017.
sanitized_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-12-01T00:00:00Z'), $lte: ISODate('2017-12-31T23:59:59Z') } } }, { $unwind: '$items' }, { $group: { _id: '$storeLocation', items: { $push: { name: '$items.name', quantity: '$items.quantity' } } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, storeLocation: '$_id', items: 1 } }])

generated_prompt: What was the average number of online sales per day in Q3 2017?
generated_sql: db.sales.aggregate([{ $match: { purchaseMethod: 'Online', saleDate: { $gte: ISODate('2017-07-01T00:00:00Z'), $lt: ISODate('2017-10-01T00:00:00Z') } } }, { $group: { _id: { $dateToString: { format: '%Y-%m-%d', date: '$saleDate' } }, salesCount: { $sum: 1 } } }, { $group: { _id: null, averageSalesPerDay: { $avg: '$salesCount' } } }, { $project: { _id: 0, averageSalesPerDay: 1 } }])

nl_prompt: What was the average number of online sales per day in Q3 2017?
prompt: What was the average number of online sales per day in Q3 2017?
